media.source_note: Debranded/cropped local ClinCheck-style simulation matching the canonical sample STLs by source STL hash.
observations: Shows anterior crowding/rotation correction with attachments and visible IPR labels.
Useful for sample-case comparison and model-development notes, not a clinical approval or outcome record.
limitations: No side or occlusal views retained in this media file.
No root, bone, periodontal, radiographic, or outcome-scan evidence.
Third-party treatment-planning simulation; redistribution rights must be confirmed before public data sharing.
